subject: docs: add shared Supabase migration process to AI_MISTAKES and SESSION_NOTES
body:
Document the correct stub-file approach for pushing migrations to a shared
Supabase DB. Never use `migration repair --status reverted` on another
project's migrations — it deletes their history table entries.

Tags: documentation, supabase, migrations
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 3
Impact: infrastructure
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: deployment
Semver: patch
title: add shared Supabase migration process to AI_MISTAKES and SESSION_NOTES
